tldr:
• CryptoXRP gives back gains after 10% rally as traders take profit near $1.25
  • AIAnthropic shutdown makes a strong case for decentralized AI: Grayscale
  • Digital paymentsThe Clearing House unveils digital payments initiative backed by major institutions
montis:
• CryptoXRP gives back gains after 10% rally Asian demand and ETF inflows helped push XRP through $1.20, but the token struggled to hold its highs after running into fresh selling near a key resistance zone. The rally was short-lived as traders took profit near $1.25.💡 Montis angle: The XRP price movement highlights the volatility of the crypto market.
    ↗ Source June 16
  • AIAnthropic shutdown makes a strong case for decentralized AI The shutdown of Anthropic, an AI company, has made a strong case for decentralized AI, according to Grayscale. Decentralized AI can provide more security and transparency compared to traditional AI systems. 💡 Montis angle: The shutdown of Anthropic highlights the need for decentralized AI solutions.
    ↗ Source June 16
  • Digital paymentsThe Clearing House unveils digital payments initiative The Clearing House has launched a bank-led digital payments initiative to enable the clearing and settlement of tokenised commercial bank money at scale. This initiative aims to improve the efficiency and security of digital payments. 💡 Montis angle: The initiative has the potential to transform the digital payments landscape.
    ↗ Source June 12
  • CryptoJardine Matheson to buy back $500M in shares Jardine Matheson Holdings has announced a strategic blueprint that includes a share buyback, boosting returns and adding exposure to developed markets. 💡 Montis angle: The share buyback is expected to have a positive impact on the company's stock price.
    ↗ Source June 16
  • BlockchainBlockworks: Building trust in onchain capital markets Blockworks is a data and software platform for crypto markets, offering investor relations software, a data API, and a market research platform. 💡 Montis angle: Blockworks is playing a crucial role in building trust in onchain capital markets.
    ↗ Source June 16
